description_long: This is a compact, rectangular shelving unit featuring a sturdy black metal frame and three wooden shelves with a dark brown finish. The sides of the frame are adorned with geometric, square-patterned metal bars, adding a modern, industrial aesthetic. The top, middle, and bottom shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage or display space for various items. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, while the back is also open, making it suitable for placement against a wall or as a room divider. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. Its size and proportions make it ideal for use in entryways, garages, or on sidewalks for temporary displays.
description: A modern, industrial-style shelving unit with a black metal frame and three dark brown wooden shelves, featuring geometric side accents. Its open design offers accessible storage and display space.
description_view_0: Side view showing the geometric metal side bars and the depth of the three wooden shelves.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the shelves and the open, accessible design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the geometric metal pattern and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open back and the alignment of the shelves within the frame.
